app.name: WAKI
home.nudge: You haven't checked in today. How are you feeling?
home.quote: You are doing better than you think.
consent.title: Before we begin
consent.noticeCompanion: WAKI is a supportive companion, not a licensed therapist.
consent.noticePrivacy: Your data stays on this device — nothing is sent to a server without your action.
consent.noticeCrisis: In a crisis, the app will always offer you emergency contacts.
consent.toggleLocal: Store mood data on this device
consent.toggleLocalHint: Required for check-ins, mood tracking, and conversation history.
consent.toggleTrainHint: Share anonymised usage patterns (never your conversations or personal data).
consent.toggleCloudHint: Optional. Back up your data so you can restore it on a new phone.
firstCheckin.title: How are you feeling right now?
firstCheckin.subtitle: Let's start with a quick check-in. Pick the emotion closest to how you feel.
onboarding.languageSubtitle: {{roster}}. Tap the one you want to use — you can change this later in your profile.
onboarding.nicknameSubtitle: This name is only stored on your device.
checkin.title: How are you feeling?
checkin.subtitle: Choose what's closest to your mood right now.
checkin.savedBody: Thank you for taking a moment to check in with yourself.
conversation.safeguard: WAKI is not a therapist or crisis service. If you are in danger, call 999.
crisis.title: Are you safe right now?
crisis.headline: You are not alone.
crisis.subline: Reaching out is a sign of strength.
crisis.barText: If you're struggling, help is available.
crisis.footer: WAKI is not a crisis service. If you are in immediate danger, call emergency services.
toolkit.title: Coping Tools
toolkit.subtitle: Guided exercises to help you feel grounded.
profile.localData: Your data stays on this device
profile.sessionBody: Log out to clear your saved session and return to onboarding.
profile.logoutBody: This will clear your local session so you can start again from onboarding.
settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationHint: Get a gentle nudge to check in each day
settings.dataExportHint: Download your mood history and sessions as a file
settings.exportFallback: Sharing is not available on this device. Your export was created at: {{path}}
settings.exportFailed: Couldn't export your data right now.
settings.restoreDataHint: Pick a WAKI backup file from this device
settings.deleteAllBody: This will permanently delete all your mood check-ins, conversations, and settings. This cannot be undone.
learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Understand your mind. One topic at a time.
stories.title: Stories
stories.subtitle: Real experiences from people like you.
audio.playbackError: Couldn't play this audio right now. Please try again.
offline.banner: You are offline. Some features may not work.
permission.micBody: WAKI needs microphone access for voice conversations.
safeguard.statement: WAKI is not a therapist, doctor, or crisis service. If you are in danger, call 999.
